g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I download hg38 from UCSC?')
sendPrompt('How does the sliding window chunking work for hg38?')
sendPrompt('How are DNA bases mapped to integer tokens?')
sendPrompt('What is the shape of the saved hg38_tokens.npy file?')
sendPrompt('How is the HG38Dataset class implemented?')
sendPrompt('How is the PyTorch DataLoader configured for hg38 training?')
sendPrompt('How is the timestep t sampled during SEDD training?')
sendPrompt('How does the absorb/mask noise process work in SEDD?')
sendPrompt('What does a noised DNA sequence look like mid-diffusion?')
g.text: e.g. A ? G ? A T ? C

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the timestep t embedded and passed to the model?')
sendPrompt('What is the token embedding layer in SEDD?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the DiT block architecture with adaLN used in SEDD')
sendPrompt('What does the score head output and how is cross-entropy loss computed?')
